188 
ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 
LABEL: 
Ordering Provider NPI 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider ID (NPI) of the provider who requested the service or items being reported on 
this service line. 
SHORT NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 
LONG NAME: ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
OT header
